chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rights of the Animal Upon Its Owner

text: 2472 - وَ قَالَ اَلْبَاقِرُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ حُرْمَةٌ وَ حُرْمَةُ اَلْبَهَائِمِ فِي وُجُوهِهَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2472 - Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as)  said:
"Everything has a sanctity, and the sanctity of animals lies in their faces."
